_comment: Rebrand the whole site here. Change siteName + ownerName (e.g. 'Jimmie's Hits' / 'Jimmie') and it updates everywhere — title, home page, footer, link previews. This file ships to Railway on deploy. You can also override at deploy time with the NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_NAME / NEXT_PUBLIC_OWNER_NAME env vars in the Railway dashboard.
